response.justification: Bogdan brings 20+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React depth and directly relevant AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators — a differentiator for this role. Cloud, containerization, and TDD fundamentals are solid. The main gaps are no explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Python, and PostgreSQL is absent from his toolset. Given the seniority floor is 6+ years and he vastly exceeds it, and given the AI-agent overlap, these gaps are learnable risks rather than disqualifiers.
strengths: AI agent infrastructure experience including MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS stack with 15+ years of full-stack delivery across multiple production environments
Strong testing culture: authored a TDD library (Fluent-Asserts), ran testing workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD disciplines across multiple roles
concerns: No Nest.js or Vitest mentioned anywhere on the resume — two of the five primary stack items are unaccounted for
Kotlin and Python are absent from his skills list; Java appears only in embedded/robotics context, not backend services
PostgreSQL is not listed; database experience skews toward MongoDB and MySQL, leaving relational depth partially unverified
